/share/apps/gcc/11.2.0/bin/g++ -fPIC -pg -g -pg -shared -Wl,-soname,libllava_shared.so -o libllava_shared.so CMakeFiles/llava.dir/llava.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llava.dir/clip.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/people/hoan163/project/llamaProfiling/llama.cpp/LlamaDebug/src:/people/hoan163/project/llamaProfiling/llama.cpp/LlamaDebug/ggml/src: ../../src/libllama.so -lpthread ../../ggml/src/libggml.so /share/apps/cuda/12.3/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so
